channel.title: Web Development on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: My Fix for Clean Hugo URLs with Dated Folders
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Tired of messy, date-filled URLs in your Hugo site? Learn the one-line fix in hugo.toml to organize content in dated folders while keeping clean, flat permalinks.
